$schema: Annotation events for chart overlays. See lib/annotations.ts for the schema. Add events as the Lending Pulse drafts surface them; charts opt in via the `chartKeys` filter.

events.label: Allocator rotation
events.description: Morpho PYUSD utilization briefly spiked above 95% as a single MetaMorpho allocator rotated capital between markets, lifting supply APY into double digits for ~3 days.

events.label: rsETH contagion
events.description: Mid-Feb 2026 rsETH redemption queue extended past several positions' liquidation windows, triggering forced liquidations across Aave V3 and Spark and curator-vault losses on Morpho. Sector liquidation volume ~5× the trailing-90d weekly mean.

events.label: Aave V3 USDC spike
events.description: Apr 17-21 cross-protocol dispersion peaked at 833 bps as Aave V3 USDC supply APY jumped on a borrow surge while the other three protocols stayed inside their 90d range.

events.label: Sector peak ~$80B
events.description: Late August 2025 marked the all-time-high for cross-protocol lending collateral on Ethereum, driven by LRT inflows on Aave V3 + Spark and the rsETH growth wave that later contracted in early 2026.
